blockers: Missing virtualized infinite-scroll message list (@tanstack/react-virtual) and cursor-based pagination in MessageList — P0 feature F-2 / AC-2 unmet.

Frontend has no real Socket.io client or SSE consumer; it relies entirely on an in-memory mock event bus, disconnecting it from the backend real-time and AI streaming endpoints — P0 features F-1 / F-4 unmet.
Missing Docker Compose deployment artifact (docker-compose.yml) despite being listed in-scope in requirements-lock.json and architecture.md.
MessageList useEffect re-subscribes to event listeners on every message change because 'messages' is in the dependency array, causing unnecessary churn and potential race conditions.
suggestions: Add a React error boundary around ChatPage to prevent total UI crashes.
Provide a retry action in the composer or MessageItem for messages with status 'failed'.
Increase backend test coverage for uncovered branches (reaction limit error, disconnect cleanup, store edge cases).
Introduce a minimal i18n stub (e.g., t() helper) for all user-facing strings to align with the PRD i18n requirement.
